page_content: ENAE471 Aircraft Flight Testing (3 Credits) Provides basic instruction to aircraft flight testing and demonstrates need for systematic, well-proven technique to allow for accurate airplane performance. Concepts of aerodynamics, airplane performance, and stability and control. Emphasis on single-engine general aviation type aircraft. Prerequisite: ENAE414. Corequisite: ENAE403. Restriction: Must be in Engineering: Aerospace program.
